text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, I look outside to see piles of
snow. The temperature must have dropped
suddenly last night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The snow on the track has already been plowed,
though, so training shouldn't be an issue.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're already here.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm not running!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna run! No way! I don't feel like it one
bit!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph!
...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She takes a peek at me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Nope!

text_block_list.name: Experienced Trainer
text_block_list.text:
What are they doing over there on the side of the
track?

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Oh... That trainer's getting pushed around by
their trainee. It looks like she's having another
tantrum.

text_block_list.name: Experienced Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! And the snow's only going to get
heavier... What if she catches a cold?

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'm pretty worried too. She's still pretty
young.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is standing next to me, breathing on
her hands to try and stay warm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She already got changed and came all the way
here. She'd definitely warm up faster if she just
started running.
choice_data_list: (I wonder why she doesn't want to.)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What're you staring at me for?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna say something, just say it. That's
what all the other adults do.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Tell me to run for my future, or to go home if I
don't feel like running, or whatever.
choice_data_list: I'm sure you have your reasons.
I'm sure you have your reasons.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she really didn't want to run, I don't think she
would have shown up for training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she makes the effort to come to every single
training session... I really have no reason to doubt
her motivation.
choice_data_list: I'd rather just believe in you and wait.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Whatever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Snow starts to fall while I wait for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I brush the snowflakes off my shoulders, and the
damp spots they leave on my clothes slowly grow
wider.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The snowfall thickens and eases over time, but
continues nonetheless. I sit beside Sweep Tosho
on the track in weather just as moody as she is.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna run! Time me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Accelerating with minimal effort, she cuts right
through the cold air.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear others chattering all around me and realize
I'm not the only one captivated by Sweep Tosho's
running.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Pant... Phewww!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I wanna find that racing magic! And that's why I
wanna run in a big race!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I know what to do! You don't have to tell me! It's
not like my head's totally empty!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But I'm so sick of everyone telling me what to do
and acting like they're so much smarter than me...
It makes me so mad!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's really not what I want from them. Even if
they just say it's all for my sake...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I just see red when I hear someone say it. Even
though I should be focused on my race, I get so
wound up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: But you, Familiar...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're the only one who speaks to me like you
did earlier. Like asking if I had a reason.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Just believe in me. Listen to what I think.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Don't try and force me to do what you think's
right!
choice_data_list:
Well, you have your own idea of what's right for
you.

Well, you have your own idea of what's right for
you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Duh. I wanna find that racing magic! That's why I
work so hard every day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At some point while I watch her train, the snow
stops.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, Familiar.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Earlier, I was just checking to make sure you
weren't lying when you said you believed in me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And, well... I guess you passed, so I'll cast a
special spell on you as a reward.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Twinkle Twinkle ☆ Rank up, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Mmm, I guess that should do it.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I leveled up your familiar ranking! Now you're just
a teeeensy bit cooler than before!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Also, that spell made you more special than the
other familiars. You're special enough now that I
can ask you for advice.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's right. So listen up.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I wanna run in the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Grandma told me that my great grandma used magic in that race!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I saw it in a book too! It said that a great witch
who was friends with a great fairy wore a tiara!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: So?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What do you look so confused for, dummy?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
This is the part where you tell me what kinda
training I should do for the Oka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're such a carrot-head! Now that you've
ranked up as a familiar, you should be able to
read your master's thoughts!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
When I tell you what I wanna do, you're supposed
to be two steps ahead!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Got that, Familiar?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Start thinking, then. What kind of training should
I do for the Oka Sho?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Prompted by Sweep Tosho, I move to stand next
to her.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And it's your job to deal with all the adults who
try and talk to me before races!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And you need to have some tasty juice ready for
me in the waiting room! And...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The second I stand next to her, she starts barking
one order after another for her "familiar."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the first race my demanding master and I will
be attempting in the new year is the Oka Sho.
